fields.label: Title
fields.value: Service categories that move with the page.

fields.label: Title
fields.value: A steady message beside a moving proof stream.

fields.label: Body
fields.value: Use this section when the page needs one persistent idea while supporting details, proof points, or service moments move through the reader's attention.

fields.label: Card 1 / Title
fields.value: The request path stays obvious while details unfold.

fields.label: Card 1 / Body
fields.value: A sticky message can hold the main promise in place while the supporting column explains what happens after a homeowner reaches out.

fields.label: Card 2 / Title
fields.value: Each card can carry a focused operational proof point.

fields.label: Card 2 / Body
fields.value: Use the stream for arrival windows, diagnostic steps, photo-backed notes, or practical expectations that make the service feel organized.

fields.label: Card 3 / Title
fields.value: Complex service decisions become easier to scan.

fields.label: Card 3 / Body
fields.value: The section can slow the page down without becoming static, giving each idea enough room to land as the visitor scrolls.

fields.label: Card 4 / Title
fields.value: The final card can reinforce confidence before conversion.

fields.label: Card 4 / Body
fields.value: Close the stream with cleanup, documentation, follow-up, or another trust point that makes the next action feel low-friction.

fields.label: Title
fields.value: Clear answers before customers reach out.

fields.label: Body
fields.value: A full-width accordion pattern for service pages that need organized answers without overwhelming the layout.

fields.label: Item 1 / Question
fields.value: Do you provide estimates before work begins?

fields.label: Item 1 / Answer
fields.value: Yes. Customers receive a clear scope, pricing guidance, and an approval point before paid work starts. If the work changes once we are on site, we explain the reason and confirm the next step first.

fields.label: Item 2 / Answer
fields.value: This placeholder can be adapted for city, county, or neighborhood coverage. It works well for businesses that serve a defined metro area and want to make location fit obvious before someone contacts the team.

fields.label: Item 3 / Answer
fields.value: Yes. This pattern supports one-time visits and recurring service plans, with room to explain seasonal tune-ups, reminder schedules, and what is included in each maintenance appointment.

fields.label: Item 4 / Question
fields.value: How quickly can someone schedule service?

fields.label: Item 4 / Answer
fields.value: Availability depends on the service type and current schedule, but this section can communicate standard response windows, same-week availability, emergency support, and what customers should expect after submitting a request.

fields.label: Item 5 / Question
fields.value: Are your technicians licensed and insured?

fields.label: Item 5 / Answer
fields.value: Yes. Use this answer to reinforce credentials, insurance coverage, background checks, training, or any local certifications that help customers feel confident before inviting the team into their home or business.

fields.label: Title
fields.value: Make it easy for customers to reach the team.

fields.label: Body
fields.value: A reusable contact section placeholder for phone, email, hours, and a simple form preview.

fields.label: Title

fields.label: Body
fields.value: A larger image-led service card pattern for showing primary offers with more visual weight.

fields.label: Item 1 / Body
fields.value: Fast help for urgent issues that need an experienced technician and a clear path to resolution.

fields.label: Item 2 / Body
fields.value: Seasonal tune-ups, inspection notes, and practical recommendations that reduce surprises.

fields.label: Item 3 / Body
fields.value: Clean, documented installs for new systems, fixtures, and upgrades with tidy closeout.

fields.label: Item 4 / Body
fields.value: Detailed checks with photo-backed notes, priority guidance, and simple recommendations customers can understand.

fields.label: Item 5 / Body
fields.value: Responsive support for offices, shops, and small facilities that need reliable communication.

fields.label: Item 6 / Body
fields.value: Helpful planning for customers comparing options, budgets, timelines, and future service needs.

fields.label: Body
fields.value: Use this asymmetrical feature section to pair a three-column intro with four compact proof points.

fields.label: Card 1 / Body
fields.value: Repair, maintenance, and replacement guidance based on the home, budget, and timing.

fields.label: Card 2 / Body
fields.value: Explain what is happening, what can wait, and what needs attention now.

fields.label: Card 3 / Body
fields.value: Keep scheduling practical with clear next steps and responsive appointment windows.

fields.label: Card 4 / Body
fields.value: Ground the experience in nearby service areas, familiar homes, and steady follow-through.

fields.label: Title
fields.value: Longer proof for high-trust service pages.

fields.label: Body
fields.value: A centered testimonial carousel for pages that need a stronger customer story after the introductory copy.

fields.label: Item 1 / Quote
fields.value: From the first call to the final walkthrough, the team made a stressful repair feel completely manageable. They explained the issue clearly, showed me the options, and left the house cleaner than they found it.

fields.label: Item 2 / Quote
fields.value: We had put off replacing our old system because every estimate felt confusing. This team gave us a straightforward plan, arrived exactly when they said they would, and finished the installation without disrupting our workday.

fields.label: Item 3 / Quote
fields.value: The maintenance visit caught two small problems before they became expensive ones. I appreciated how practical the recommendations were, and I never felt pushed into work we did not actually need.

fields.label: Title
fields.value: Serving Huntersville and nearby North Charlotte communities.

fields.label: Body
fields.value: Give visitors a quick way to confirm coverage before they start a service request.

fields.label: Prompt
fields.value: Not sure if we service your area?

fields.label: Success Body
fields.value: Send the request and the team will confirm timing.

fields.label: Label
fields.value: Trusted by homeowners, property managers, and small businesses across the metro area
